title: Big Globe - Remove Portal Temple
description: Remove Portal Temple of Big Globe
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-remove-portal-temple)

This mod/datapack removes the Portal Temple of [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe), which makes it no longer generated in the world

This would make leaving the nether is something more difficult and could be lost longer even

### **Example Before:**
![g](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6c6ac8cc17cb6f0acc882a1b78e375062e062db_0.webp)
### **Example After:**
